text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy is truly amazing, isn't<n>it?
Wherever you wish to go, you can<n>get there
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not too big, so it's easy to remember<n>your way
around, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I might actually be able to walk around<n>and see
all the facilities here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I tried that at home once, but it was so<n>big I got
lost. Maybe I'll try again<n>here! ♪
